full_video_sequence_variations.purpose: Alternative complete movement structures for Grok image-to-video fashion generation using a base image.
full_video_sequence_variations.selection_instruction: Use only sequence_02_hair_adjustment_then_outfit_display. Do not combine it with another sequence.

variations.name: Ajustar cabelo e mostrar roupa
variations.best_for: More feminine and natural lifestyle-style fashion videos.

timeline.action: The subject casually brushes her hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture is quick, soft and realistic.
Her hand returns naturally to a relaxed position. Her expression remains neutral, not smiling constantly.
She takes one small step forward and subtly adjusts her posture to show the outfit better.
She lightly smooths an existing fabric area of the outfit, without changing the garment shape.
She gently shifts her hips side to side in a very subtle way while keeping one hand near the waist.
She turns her head slightly to one side, gives a short warm smile, then returns to neutral.

variations.expression_behavior: Neutral during hair adjustment, faint smile during outfit smoothing, then relaxed neutral with a brief final smile.
